tasks.subject: Task 1: TvTheme composable + wire all TV activities
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create `TvTheme.kt` and update all six TV activities to use it instead of the bare `MaterialTheme {}` wrapper.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/TvTheme.kt`
- Modify: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/TvMainActivity.kt`
- Modify: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/auth/TvLoginActivity.kt`
- Modify: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/search/TvSearchActivity.kt`
- Modify: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/detail/TvMediaDetailActivity.kt`
- Modify: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/episode/TvEpisodeActivity.kt`
- Modify: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/stream/TvStreamActivity.kt`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] TvTheme.kt uses darkColorScheme with colorResource for primary/onPrimary/secondary
- [ ] All six TV activities use TvTheme {} instead of MaterialTheme {}
- [ ] compileDebugKotlin passes

**Verify:** `./gradlew compileDebugKotlin --no-daemon 2>&1 | tail -5` → `BUILD SUCCESSFUL`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/TvTheme.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/TvMainActivity.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/auth/TvLoginActivity.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/search/TvSearchActivity.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/detail/TvMediaDetailActivity.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/episode/TvEpisodeActivity.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/stream/TvStreamActivity.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew compileDebugKotlin --no-daemon 2>&1 | tail -5", "acceptanceCriteria": ["TvTheme.kt uses darkColorScheme with colorResource for primary/onPrimary/secondary", "All six TV activities use TvTheme {} instead of MaterialTheme {}", "compileDebugKotlin passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Replace hardcoded colours in non-card screens
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove all hardcoded colour literals in TvAppShell, TvBrowseScreen, TvPlaceholderScreen, and TvMediaDetailScreen, replacing with MaterialTheme.colorScheme.* tokens.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/TvAppShell.kt`
- Modify: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/TvBrowseScreen.kt`
- Modify: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/TvPlaceholderScreen.kt`
- Modify: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/detail/TvMediaDetailScreen.kt`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] No Color.Black/White/Gray/LightGray/0xFF0D0D0D/0xFF1A1A1A literals remain
- [ ] CircularProgressIndicator no longer passes color=Color.White
- [ ] compileDebugKotlin passes

**Verify:** `./gradlew compileDebugKotlin --no-daemon 2>&1 | tail -5` → `BUILD SUCCESSFUL`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/TvAppShell.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/TvBrowseScreen.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/TvPlaceholderScreen.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/detail/TvMediaDetailScreen.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew compileDebugKotlin --no-daemon 2>&1 | tail -5", "acceptanceCriteria": ["No Color.Black/White/Gray/LightGray literals remain", "CircularProgressIndicator no longer passes color=Color.White", "compileDebugKotlin passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Migrate material3.Card → tv.material3.Surface in card screens
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace material3.Card with tv.material3.Surface in TvSearchScreen, TvEpisodeScreen, and TvStreamScreen.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/search/TvSearchScreen.kt`
- Modify: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/episode/TvEpisodeScreen.kt`
- Modify: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/stream/TvStreamScreen.kt`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] No material3.Card or CardDefaults imports remain
- [ ] tv.material3.Surface used for all clickable cards
- [ ] M3Surface alias used for non-interactive badges
- [ ] compileDebugKotlin passes

**Verify:** `./gradlew compileDebugKotlin --no-daemon 2>&1 | tail -5` → `BUILD SUCCESSFUL`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/search/TvSearchScreen.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/episode/TvEpisodeScreen.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/stream/TvStreamScreen.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew compileDebugKotlin --no-daemon 2>&1 | tail -5", "acceptanceCriteria": ["No material3.Card or CardDefaults imports remain", "tv.material3.Surface used for all clickable cards", "M3Surface alias used for non-interactive badges", "compileDebugKotlin passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: TvBookmarksScreen + TvAppShell wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create TvBookmarksScreen with anime-only paged grid and wire into TvAppShell.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/TvBookmarksScreen.kt`
- Modify: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/TvAppShell.kt`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] BookmarkViewModel parametersOf(null, Category.ANIME, false)
- [ ] 5-column grid with tv.material3.Surface cards 180x270dp
- [ ] Click navigates to TvEpisodeActivity
- [ ] Unauthenticated error shows login button
- [ ] compileDebugKotlin passes

**Verify:** `./gradlew compileDebugKotlin --no-daemon 2>&1 | tail -5` → `BUILD SUCCESSFUL`

tasks.subject: Task 5: TvScheduleScreen + ScheduleViewModel fix + TvAppShell wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Fix ScheduleViewModel to load without login, create Netflix-style weekly schedule screen, wire into TvAppShell.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/anime/schedule/ScheduleViewModel.kt`
- Create: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/TvScheduleScreen.kt`
- Modify: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/TvAppShell.kt`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] ScheduleViewModel.isLoginRequired = false
- [ ] Day rows with horizontal LazyRow of tv.material3.Surface cards
- [ ] Click navigates to TvMediaDetailActivity
- [ ] compileDebugKotlin passes

**Verify:** `./gradlew compileDebugKotlin --no-daemon 2>&1 | tail -5` → `BUILD SUCCESSFUL`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/anime/schedule/ScheduleViewModel.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/TvScheduleScreen.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/TvAppShell.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew compileDebugKotlin --no-daemon 2>&1 | tail -5", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ScheduleViewModel.isLoginRequired = false", "Day rows with horizontal LazyRow of tv.material3.Surface cards", "Click navigates to TvMediaDetailActivity", "compileDebugKotlin passes"]}
```
